_comment: Single source of truth for model routing (issue #63, council design 2026-07-02). spawn_sites hold TIER ALIASES only (opus|sonnet|haiku|fable), plus 'inherit' (follow session model) or 'openrouter' (resolve via tasks map; requires egress_policy). Concrete claude-* IDs live ONLY in tiers. Validated by pipeline/hooks/check_model_routing.py (pre-commit, hard). Human-readable table: docs/model-routing.md.

max-plan.description: Personal Max plan: rate limits, not dollars. Quality ceiling; cheap work stays in-family (free under plan) with zero egress.
max-plan.cost_basis: rate-limit budget; optimize cost per successful outcome, not per token

api-billed.description: Work account: dollars per token. Sonnet default, manual escalation; OpenRouter Pattern B trial behind cost ceiling, eval-gated.
api-billed.cost_basis: dollars; cached input is ~1/10 price, so keep prompts append-only before downshifting models

challenge.note: fable falls back to opus on spawn error; cap pair count

ship_review.note: user direction 2026-07-02 (delegate reviews to sonnet) supersedes the council's fable/opus recommendation; escalate to opus on repeat failure

subagent.note: 0 of 38 agent files carry model frontmatter; subagents follow the session model by design

routed_consult.note: NO callers may be wired until the F11 12-case smoke eval passes (council gate)

cheap_tasks.note: Max plan: in-family Haiku 4.5, temp 0, free under plan, zero egress. OpenRouter on Max is Hold (bills dollars +5.5% fee to avoid a free call)

openrouter.kill_switch: set defaults.fallback=claude and empty the tasks map; routing.py degrades without error

_id_refresh.procedure: python3 mcp/openrouter/check_models.py (see mcp/openrouter/README.md; run monthly and before enabling any routed_consult caller)
